## [00:00 - 02:32]

Alright guys, so now what we want to do is we want to make sure that we are integrating our bot, especially this little sentence here, the input with our email, with our email CRM system. So, I've gone ahead and created an email list in my email system. Now that could be getResponse, you could be using Active Campaign, you could be using HubSpot, whatever that is. I'm going to be using getResponse for the example of this demo. I'm not going to go into that specific software, I'm just going to be showing you in Zapier how this works. So basically when someone gives me their email here, I want to make sure that this is put into the new list that I've created. So what I'm going to do is I'm going to head into Zapier and click Make a Zap. I'm then going to select Many Chat as my trigger. I'm going to create new or updated custom field. And then I'm going to select the account, which I think it's this one. I don't know why I have so many here. Alright, and then custom field here. This is the custom field that you would have entered in your bot and for us it's email. So let's go ahead and continue. And then it's going to pull up some samples and make sure that that custom field exists. So let's click Continue for now. Okay, and now I'm going to click the email CRM system and I click Get Response, create a contact. And now is here where we select our account. And almost there. I'm going to select the list that I created. So I just named it the name of the training. And then the email. And then the name. Perfect. I'm going to click on Save. And then I'm going to finish my zap. And then Save it. And you can save it into a folder as well and then turn it on.
